item.name: Victor Whistle
item.description: The shrill sound of this hand-carved whistle calls forth Victor, your champion show canis.

mount.name: Victor
mount.action: Summon forth Victor, a dog to rule over all dogs─at dog shows, that is.
mount.description: Lauded by no less a personage than Emperor Varis, Victor is a perennial champion at Garlean dog shows. Being bred and trained for competition, it isn't suited to combat, though it may at least intimidate foes with its fearsome mien.
mount.tooltip:
Hmph, all bark an' no bite!
- Rabid Wives Houndkeep
